title: Numbers: gaming stats
text: Level 99 max HP 1500 EXP 24000 won 12 lost 3 streak 7 rank 42 score 9876 kills 18 K/D 2.5 winrate 65 percent
tips: Numbers should flow as fast as letters by now

character_tips.anna: Gaming stats are pure number+word mixing. Real teen vocab.
character_tips.maxim: Numbers in context — better than isolated digit drills.
